title: Antifungal from F2G, Shionogi succeeds in Phase 3 study
summary: F2G and Shionogi reported a successful Phase 3 study for their antifungal therapy.

title: Kardigan raises $400M in IPO to back three clinical-stage cardio drugs
summary: Kardigan's IPO will fund development of three clinical-stage cardiovascular drug candidates.

title: Biogen makes up to $1B deal for secretive anti-inflammatory biotech
summary: Biogen struck a deal worth up to $1B for a biotech developing anti-inflammatory therapies.

title: FDA gives rejected drugs another chance in post-Makary era
summary: The FDA is revisiting previously rejected drug applications under new agency leadership priorities.

title: UK waitlist for Novo's Wegovy pill triples in week after approval
summary: Demand for Novo Nordisk's oral Wegovy pill surged in the UK following its approval, an online pharmacy reports.

title: Hackers claim they stole Novo Nordisk AI models, manufacturing recipes
summary: A hacking group claims to have exfiltrated proprietary AI models and manufacturing data from Novo Nordisk.

title: In second reversal, FDA gives uniQure a green light to seek accelerated approval
summary: The FDA reversed course again, allowing uniQure to pursue accelerated approval for its gene therapy.

title: Jazz turns to AbCellera for T cell engagers in up to $4.1B partnership
summary: Jazz Pharmaceuticals and AbCellera announced a partnership worth up to $4.1B to develop T cell engager therapies.

title: Triveni Bio raises $65M ahead of upcoming readouts on eczema drugs
summary: Triveni Bio closed a $65M round ahead of key data readouts for its eczema drug candidates.

title: Migraine biotech Vedana Therapeutics makes its debut with $46M Series A
summary: Vedana Therapeutics launched with a $46M Series A to develop new migraine treatments.

title: B cell therapy maker Be Bio stops hemophilia trial
summary: Be Bio halted its hemophilia trial for its B cell therapy program.

title: FDA raises no major red flags with Moderna's flu shot
summary: FDA reviewers found no significant safety concerns in Moderna's flu vaccine candidate ahead of a decision.

title: Edgewise to advance heart drug into Phase 3 following mid-stage data update
summary: Edgewise Therapeutics will move its cardiac drug candidate into Phase 3 after positive mid-stage results.

title: Lilly buys another pain biotech; FDA sets decision for once-weekly PrEP pill
summary: Eli Lilly acquired another pain-focused biotech, while the FDA set a decision date for a once-weekly PrEP pill.

title: CMS seeks to close Medicare negotiation 'loophole'
summary: CMS proposed changes aimed at closing a loophole in Medicare drug price negotiations.

title: Takeda fortifies orexin potential with more Phase 3 data
summary: Takeda released additional Phase 3 data supporting its orexin-targeting drug program.
